headline: Trump’s Golden Dome Push Gets $1.75 Billion Boost, Space Force Orders 36 Missile-Tracking Satellites From Sierra Space and L3Harris
summary: US Space Development Agency awarded $1.75B to Sierra Space, L3Harris to build 36 satellites for Trump's Golden Dome missile-defense program.
